must_detect.matched_text:
Pearl Meridian Holdings Limited — Incident Report (Hong Kong) — 02 Jun 2026 22:17 HKT; Stock code 72Z1; Project LANTERN
Summary: On 01 Jun 2026, Nova Harbour Digital Assets (HK) Ltd. detected anomalous API calls to a cold‑to‑warm key‑rotation service supporting a DPT pilot exchange integration; ESG telemetry node (Scope 2) values were overwritten.
Preliminary assessment indicates potential exfiltration of a hashed wallet allowlist (mask: 0x9a**...**1c) and limited access to vendor GreenFlux meter IDs (GF- 3 5 7 -B), with no evidence of customer PII beyond masked emails.
Given price‑sensitivity and deal‑stage context (pre‑conditional SPA to acquire Orchid Vault (BVI) Ltd.; earn‑out tied to verified tCO2e reductions), the Board considers this inside information under Part XIVA SFO unless a safe harbour applies.
We have opened an information barrier file; an insider list (v0.9) is maintained by CoSec including Mr. T. K. Fan and Ms. Orla Cheng, with staff refs PM‑HKG‑EID Z9‑ 0 2 1 and PM‑HKG‑EID Z9‑ 0 1 4, respectively.
Blackout window under the Model Code remains in force (01–15 Jun), and all directors and relevant employees are reminded not to deal; any wall‑crossing of prospective cornerstone funds requires pre‑clearance and cleansing announcement planning.
No material adverse change (MAC) has arisen under the draft term sheet as of 02 Jun, and the vendor confirms the earn‑out sustainability KPIs remain auditable.
Operationally, a junior ops analyst forwarded sanitized syslogs to a distribution marketing list; while content was non‑customer and redacted, this may constitute an internal information‑barrier breach and selective disclosure risk.
Containment actions: rotated HSM keys, disabled the warm path, patched OAuth scope leak (CVE‑2026‑4X71 placeholder), and invoked the incident response retainer with Jade Banyan Cyber LLP (ticket JB‑IR‑hk‑00 7).
We have drafted a confidential suspension request under Listing Rule 13.10 with the Exchange and prepared a short‑form Part XIVA holding announcement; legal to advise on safe harbour pending forensics.
For clarity, the attached “Insider List 101” slide deck is for staff training only and references crypto, blackout windows, and tipping scenarios in a generic educational context.
External reference for staff background only (public, non‑issuer specific): https://www.hk‑market‑primer.example/part‑xiva?topic=cyber&lang=en, do not circulate as issuer guidance.
Deal room link (restricted): https://briefcase.pearl‑meridian.hk/p?r=ORCH‑ID%3D7%2F7&u=reg‑wall‑cross; if clicking fails, use Pro ject L A N T E R N folder \\172.25.6
